CustomField.description: Field used for integration between Medical Event objects in UAT and Production Veeva environments
CustomField.formula: CASE( Type__c, "Commercial Advisory Board", $Label.hippoCommercialAdvisoryBoard, "Conference", $Label.hippoConference, "Congress", $Label.hippoCongress, "Master Class", $Label.hippo_MasterclassWithoutSpace, "Roundtable", $Label.hippoRoundtable, "Site Visit", $Label.hippoSiteVisit, "Symposium", $Label.hippoSymposium, null )
CustomField.label: Event Type Medical Integration
